content.en:
Corridor of Swords.

Ye Tian came here, looking at the sharp sword light, which directly penetrated the boundary extradimensional barrier, and was secretly surprised in his heart.

He is very aware of the recovery ability of the boundary extradimensional barrier, even if it is broken, it can be slowly recovered, unless it is to use some extremely powerful formations, maintain the formation, and resist the boundary extradimensional barrier, before the channel can be formed, but if you do that, the price paid is too great.

And this corridor of swords, which is uncontrolled, can exist for countless years, and there is almost no possibility of it closing.

"This Sword Corridor is very dangerous, according to what the Qinya Realm Lord said, if the average Fourth Realm dares to walk here, they will definitely be torn apart by the sword qi of the Sword Corridor, and they will not be able to leave alive at all. "

This was also the reason why many Fourth Realms did not dare to venture through the Sword Corridor, but Ye Tian was not afraid.

"I have cultivated two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, and my physical body is extremely strong, and I should be able to leave alive, even if I am really unlucky, I encounter danger, and I fall here, and then I can copy a copy body. "

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over and stepped directly into the corridor of the sword.

Rumble!!!

Endless sword rays ran through and bombarded 347 Ye Tian's body.

With the wisdom of the Ka Ye and the body of the black mother, he directly shattered those swords.

But these swords still made Ye Tian a little stinging, you can imagine how terrifying the swords here are.

"My physical body is far beyond the other fourth realms, the sword rays here can make me sting, it's not simple, the flesh bodies of the other fourth realms can't resist the sword rays here at all, I must use some super super-dimensional dao soldiers or quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasures to be able to resist, and I can't fight for a long time, I must pass this sword corridor in a short time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As he walked step by step, the dense sword shattered.

He was not in a hurry to pass through the corridor of the sword, but as he walked, he felt the power of the sword.

"This sword light actually contains the power of extradimensional rules, and it is the compression and condensation of countless extradimensional rules in one point, coupled with the fact that the sword corridor draws the power of the boundary extradimensional barrier, it forms this endless attack. "

"The means of the sword mangs are very mysterious, if you comprehend the sword rays here, it will be beneficial for me to create the eighth dimensional will mastery!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His soul will has reached the eighth dimension, but the will of the eighth dimension (CCFB) has not yet been created, and his accumulation and background are still a little low, and if he wants to create his own eighth dimensional will in a short period of time, he can't do it yet.

But if you stay here and comprehend the power of this sword corridor, you may be able to create an eighth-dimensional will mastery.

So, he was going to stay in this corridor of swords for a few more years.

And the corridor of the sword is large enough, and it is not afraid of being discovered by other fourth realms.

Then, he gathered a replica body again and explored the corridor of the sword.

Gradually, he found that the closer he got to the other end of the Sword Corridor, the stronger the power of the sword, but the better the effect of enlightenment.

So, he continued to move forward and find a suitable place for enlightenment.

Soon, he found a suitable spot, sat cross-legged, and began to comprehend the sword here.

The other replica body continued to explore the place, but he found that the Sword Corridor was no longer a threat other than the birth of some innate multi-dimensional sword killing arrays.

These Innate Multi-Dimensional Sword Killing Arrays are all evolved by the Sword Corridor over a long period of time, and they are very dangerous, and the top Fourth Realm will be killed in an instant, even if Ye Tian crashes into the Innate Multi-Dimensional Sword Killing Array, he will be severely injured by the Sword Killing Array.

The attack power of the sword in the sword killing array can be called invincible in the fourth realm, and Ye Tian must also withdraw in time, otherwise he will not be able to resist the attack of the sword killing array at all.

And on this day, he found another danger, located in a mysterious area of the Sword Corridor, where the sword light condensed into substance, and when he touched it, his arms were shattered.

Obviously, it was not a place he could set foot in at the moment, and he was afraid that only the Fifth Realm would dare to enter it.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian didn't explore any anomalous areas, so he honestly comprehended the sword mang, trying to create the eighth dimension of the will of the peerless science.

Ye Tian found that it was not so easy to create the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Technique, it was very difficult, and the soul will had to be transformed accordingly, otherwise he would not be able to withstand the power of the Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Technique.

And after countless attempts, Ye Tian found a way, that is, to lure the sword into the soul will and temper the soul will, which is not only expected to transform the soul will, but also indirectly improve the soul will.

Thereupon.

He did it directly, but he didn't master the way at first, and directly shattered the soul will, causing the copy body to fall.

After that, after trying a few times, he found a knock on the door and began the long path of soul will refining, and let him gradually explore a new soul will refining method, which is many times better than the rock will method.

A hundred extradimensional epochs have passed, and he has perfected this method of refining the will of the soul, which he named - Sword Will Method!

The effect of refining the will with the sword light of the sword corridor is very good, and gradually every wisp of his soul will seems to have turned into a sword, and the endless soul will gradually turns into an endless sword, and the sword light gathers and merges, which also makes his overall soul will transform.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's soul will was like an innate multi-dimensional supreme sword, and the terrifying sword seemed to tear apart the corridor of this sword, but it was just an illusion.

"The soul will transformation is complete, and the eighth dimension will mastery should also be created!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Then, he spent another hundred extradimensional epochs perfecting this eighth dimensional will mastery.

Soon, a hundred extradimensional epochs passed, and this eighth-dimensional will mastery was perfected.

"Slash!"

Ye Tian's soul will turned into a supreme sword, tearing through the corridor of the sword, and slashing across the eighth dimension towards the unknown, and there was almost no loss in the process.

"It's a terrible eighth dimensional will mastery, it's definitely much stronger than the ordinary eighth dimensional will mastery, if it weren't for the Sword Corridor, even if I was asked to create and study tens of thousands of extradimensional eras, I wouldn't be able to study it. "

He was glad that he had come to the Corridor of Swords, otherwise where would he have gained such a harvest!

"It's worthy of the sixth realm, the sword corridor caused by a casual blow can make me gain this for countless years!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

The Eighth Dimension Will Peerless is so powerful, so what about the Ninth Dimension Will Peerless?

He gradually looked forward to going to the 4,000th Extradimensional Realm, where there were bound to be many Fourth Realms, and the powerful Fourth Realms were even more numerous, and the inheritance was far beyond the 5,000th Frontier.

"It's time to give this Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Sect a name, let's call it the Black Mother Sword!"
